description_long: This is a modern military fighter jet with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. The aircraft features swept-back, low-mounted wings equipped with multiple hardpoints carrying missiles and external fuel tanks. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed with a transparent canopy, providing visibility for the pilot. The jet is painted primarily in shades of gray with red and black markings, including insignia on the tail fins. The undercarriage consists of retractable tricycle landing gear, and the rear houses two large jet engine exhausts. The overall design emphasizes speed, maneuverability, and combat readiness.
description: A modern gray military fighter jet with swept low wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and visible missiles and fuel tanks. It features a forward, enclosed cockpit and prominent jet engine exhausts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical arrangement of missiles and landing gear under the wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the swept-back wings, external stores, and detailed tail markings, with landing gear and missiles clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin jet engine exhausts, twin vertical stabilizers, and the overall width of the wings and tail.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the external stores, landing gear, and tail markings from the opposite side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with multiple hardpoints and slight anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers at the rear.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy.
